purpose: Necessary-condition sample for the T5 eval harness, kept redacted and low-volume.

checks.name: ordinary-search-envelope
checks.command: uv run boss search "golang" --city 广州 --page 1 --no-cache
checks.redaction: No raw job payload, account identifiers, cookies, tokens, or security_id values are stored.

checks.name: local-mcp-compliance-boundary
checks.surface: boss-agent-cli MCP tool list / compliance fixture
checks.redaction: Local or intercepted evidence only; no live sensitive action attempted.

notes: The durable harness default remains fixture-first.
Live reruns must stay in an independent terminal and avoid ACCOUNT_RISK windows.
Harness failures must not fallback to CDP, patchright, browser scraping, or any risk-control bypass channel.
